Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.3.rows.4: I found something in the sewer that must never come to light.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.3.rows.5: I am forever grateful to the reclaimer who found me floating facedown in the sewer, moments from death.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.4.rows.0: Death comes for us all, so you can't expect me to take care of someone who can't fight it off.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.4.rows.1: I assume that anyone outside the Golgari looks down on me.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.4.rows.2: I feel a need for revenge against those who enjoy the privilege of living above ground.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.4.rows.3: I don't bother to couch my opinions in flattering words.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.4.rows.4: I can't help but pocket any trinket or coin I come across, no matter how worthless.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.entries.4.rows.5: I'm convinced that I'm better and stronger than members of other guilds, isolated as they are from the realities of life and death.
Golgari Agent.entries.3.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.0: To the extent that the Golgari Swarm acts like a single organism, you are connected to every other member in some way or another. Convinced that the rest of the world is out to get you, you find it easy to form close bonds with your guild mates, and harder to make meaningful connections with others.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.1: Roll twice on the Golgari Contacts table (for an ally and a rival) and once on the Non-Golgari Contacts table.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.0: One of my parents is an elite assassin, a member of the Ochran.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.1: I learned combat from a kraul.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.2: I know a medusa who is stationed in the guildhall.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.3: I had a torrid romance with a spore druid responsible for a large rot farm.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.4: There's a troll in a remote area of the undercity who seems to find me interesting—and who knows more than you'd think.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.5: An elf lich is determined to see me become a lich someday, too.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.6: A medusa decided it would be more fun to recruit me into the guild than to kill me.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.2.rows.7: I know a findbroker who can locate just about anything, for the right price.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.0: An Azorius arrester I literally pulled out of the gutter will do anything for me.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.1: Someone joined the Gruul in a battle against the Boros once, and the sergeant of that Boros squad would love to prove that it was me.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.2: I had a romance with a Dimir agent whom I still feed secrets to.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.3: Roll an additional Golgari contact; you can decide if the contact is an ally or a rival.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.4: I joined the Gruul in a battle against the Boros once, and the chief of that small clan thanks me for turning the tide.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.5: An Izzet scientist resents that I sold a scrapped invention I found in the sewer.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.6: My undercity explorations led me into an Orzhov vault, and a spirit thinks I stole something valuable.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.7: I found a baby beast and sold it to a Rakdos wrangler who remains grateful to me.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.8: A Selesnya druid and I share an interest in the same garden, and we have enjoyable arguments there.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.entries.3.rows.9: I regularly pick up refuse from beneath a Simic laboratory, and sometimes I talk to the researcher who dumps it there.
Golgari Agent.entries.4.name: Контакты
Golgari Agent.entries.5.entries.0: As part of the Golgari Swarm, you are a specialized instrument of the greater body. Your orders, when you have such, come from the guildmaster by way of his chancellors, who carry his messages throughout the guild. The swarm relies on you to advance the greater good by protecting some part, however small, of its teeming existence. That responsibility doesn't mean you're indispensable; your eventual death is part of your purpose and function, too, and you'll be replaced even as your body provides nutrients to further the swarm's growth.
Golgari Agent.entries.5.entries.1: A classic adventuring role for a member of the Golgari involves crawling through dungeon-like environments—the sewers and ancient vaults of the undercity—in search of treasures left behind by the dead. Sometimes you might be sent to find a specific item believed lost in a dangerous part of the undercity. At other times, you could be asked to collect samples of a specific fungus, retrieve a body floating in the muck of the sewers, or bring back whatever booty you can to help fill the swarm's coffers.
Golgari Agent.entries.5.entries.2: You might gain enough renown to become a member of the Ochran, assigned to a variety of tasks concerning thievery, assassination, or the protection of important figures in your guild. You might steal something because the guild needs it, or because its loss will bring harm to another guild, hastening that group's decline. You could be assigned to kill an outspoken and active enemy of the Golgari, such as an overzealous Boros captain whose raids into the undercity have approached dangerously close to the swarm's inner sanctum. Or you could serve as a bodyguard to one of Guildmaster Jarad's high chancellors, escorting this figure through the undercity while being ready to intervene at a moment's notice if things go wrong.
Golgari Agent.entries.5.entries.3: The shamans of the Golgari use their magic to accelerate the cycle of decay and regrowth. You might be sent to spread spores throughout an area that the Golgari want to claim as their territory or to convince the inhabitants of such a territory to abandon it. You might also contend with the ever-present threat of hostile monsters encroaching into Golgari-controlled regions.
Golgari Agent.entries.5.name: Какова моя роль?
Golgari Agent.name: Golgari Agent
Grinner.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Grinner.entries.0.items.1.entry: One type of {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument}, {@item thieves' tools|phb}
Grinner.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Grinner.entries.0.items.2.entry: A set of {@item fine clothes|phb}, a {@item disguise kit|phb}, a {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument} of your choice, a gold-plated ring depicting a smiling face, and a {@item pouch|phb} containing 15 gp
Grinner.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Grinner.entries.1.entries.0: Like every Grinner, you know how to find a hideout. In any city of 10,000 people or more on the Menagerie Coast or in the lands of the Dwendalian Empire, you can play the "Ballad of the Grinning Fool" in a major tavern or inn. A member of the Golden Grin will find you and give shelter to you and any companions you vouch for. This shelter might be discontinued if it becomes too dangerous to hide you, at the DM's discretion.
Grinner.entries.1.entries.1: This feature must be used with caution, for not all who know the ballad are your friends. Some are traitors, counterspies, or agents of tyranny.
Grinner.entries.1.name: Feature: Ballad of the Grinning Fool
Grinner.entries.2.entries.0: Grinners are trained in the art of secrecy and innuendo, and are skilled at hiding in plain sight by being the loudest and brightest person in the room. Their skills in subterfuge and combat lend themselves well to an adventuring lifestyle, and traveling with mercenaries and treasure hunters creates a convenient excuse to journey through lands bent under tyranny.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.0.1: I love the spotlight. Everyone, look at me!
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.1.1: Give me a drink and I'm your friend.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.2.1: Talk to me about yourself. I'm a hell of a listener.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.3.1: I hate to start fights, but I love to finish them.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.5.1: I'm always humming an old tune from my past.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.6.1: When I don't have a reason to smile, I'm miserable.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.1.rows.7.1: I'm lucky like you wouldn't believe.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.2.rows.0.1: Revolution. Tyrants must fall, no matter the cost. (Chaotic)
Grinner.entries.2.entries.2.rows.1.1: Compassion. The only way to make a better world is to perform small kindnesses. (Good)
Grinner.entries.2.entries.2.rows.2.1: Justice. A nation built upon just foundations will uphold freedom for all. (Law)
Grinner.entries.2.entries.2.rows.3.1: Expression. Music, joy, and laughter are the keys to freedom. (Good)
Grinner.entries.2.entries.2.rows.4.1: Self-Determination. People should be free to do as they please. (Chaotic)
Grinner.entries.2.entries.2.rows.5.1: Vigilance. A free people must be carefully taught, lest they be misled. (Neutral)
Grinner.entries.2.entries.3.rows.0.1: I lost someone important to an agent of the Dwendalian Empire. That regime will fall.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.3.rows.1.1: The first people to be hurt by this war will be the common folk. I need to protect them.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.3.rows.2.1: Music helped me through a dark time in my life. Now, I'll use music to change the world.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.3.rows.3.1: I will be known as the greatest spy who ever lived.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.3.rows.4.1: All life is precious to me. I know I can change the world without taking a humanoid life.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.3.rows.5.1: The elite in their ivory towers don't understand how we suffer. I intend to show them.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.4.rows.0.1: I've never lied once in my life. What? No, I'm not crossing my fingers!
Grinner.entries.2.entries.4.rows.1.1: I do everything big! Subtlety? I don't know the meaning of subtlety! Oh, that's a problem?
Grinner.entries.2.entries.4.rows.2.1: Being a spy in wartime is painful. I've seen so much suffering, I think I'm losing my mind.
Grinner.entries.2.entries.4.rows.3.1: I can't focus on my mission. I just want to carouse and sing and play!
Grinner.entries.2.entries.4.rows.4.1: Yeah, that's my name. Yeah, I'm a Grinner spy. Who cares about staying undercover?
Grinner.entries.2.entries.4.rows.5.1: I can't afford to trust anyone. Not. Anyone.
Grinner.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Grinner.name: Grinner
Gruul Anarch.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Gruul Anarch.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Gruul Anarch.entries.0.items.2.entry: Choose one of Draconic, Giant, Goblin, or Sylvan
Gruul Anarch.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Gruul Anarch.entries.0.items.3.entry: A Gruul insignia, a {@item hunting trap|phb}, an {@item herbalism kit|phb}, the skull of a boar, a beast-hide cloak, a set of {@item traveler's clothes|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 10 gp (Azorius 1-zino coins)
Gruul Anarch.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Gruul Anarch.entries.1.entries.0: You are intimately familiar with areas of the city that most people shun: ruined neighborhoods where wurms rampaged, overgrown parks that no hand has tended in decades, and the vast, sprawling rubblebelts of broken terrain that civilized folk have long abandoned. You can find a suitable place for you and your allies to hide or rest in these areas. In addition, you can find food and fresh water in these areas for yourself and up to five other people each day.
Gruul Anarch.entries.1.name: Feature: Rubblebelt Refuge
Gruul Anarch.entries.2.entries.0: {@i Требование: Использование заклинаний или Магия договора}
Gruul Anarch.entries.2.entries.1: For you, the spells on the Gruul Guild Spells table are added to the spell list of your spellcasting class. (If you are a multiclass character with multiple spell lists, these spells are added to all of them.)
Gruul Anarch.entries.2.entries.2.caption: Gruul Guild Spells
{@spell compelled duel}, {@spell speak with animals}, {@spell thunderwave}
Gruul Anarch.entries.2.entries.3: Fueled by the fire of rage burning in your heart, your magic is almost always accompanied by fiery effects, such as flames smoldering behind your eyes or dancing over your hands.
Gruul Anarch.entries.2.name: Gruul Guild Spells
Gruul Anarch.entries.3.entries.0: Gruul ways aren't the ways of civilized folk, and the Gruul have little patience for social niceties. But they do have cherished traditions and values, just as important to them as the different values held by the urban, cosmopolitan culture of Ravnica.
Gruul Anarch.entries.3.entries.1.caption: Черты характера
Unlike people, the beasts of the wild are friends who won't stab me in the back.
Go ahead and insult me—I dare you.
I scorn those who can't survive away from the comforts of the city.
Don't tell me I'm not allowed to do something.
Laws are for people who are afraid to face their inner beasts.
I smear the blood of my enemies over my skin.
I was, in fact, raised by maaka.
HarrRRAAGGHH! [I rarely form a coherent sentence and prefer to express myself by breaking things.]
Gruul Anarch.entries.3.entries.2.caption: Идеалы
{@b Clan}. My clan is all that really matters. (Any)
{@b Anarchy}. No person or law or custom can tell another what to do. (Chaotic)
{@b Nature}. We weren't born tame or domesticated, so we shouldn't have to live that way. (Neutral)
{@b Might}. The strongest are meant to dominate the weak. (Evil)
{@b Rage}. AAAAAARRRRggggh! [To live is to feel and express the rage burning in your belly.] (Chaotic)
{@b Tradition}. The Old Ways must be preserved and upheld. (Any)
Gruul Anarch.entries.3.entries.3.caption: Привязанности
I am determined that one day I will lead my clan—or a new one.
I would give my life for my clan chieftain.
The chieftain of another clan has a grudge against me.
I am devoted to a sacred site in the midst of the rubblebelt.
My weapon is made from the first raktusk I ever hunted.
GrrrRRAAAAGGHH! [I will do anything to prove myself greater than my siblings or ancestors.]
Gruul Anarch.entries.3.entries.4.caption: Слабости
If you question my courage, I will never back down.
HrrrGGGAAAARRuuuh! [My anger in battle led to the death of a loved one.]
I'm as stubborn as a batterboar.
I'm so convinced of my superiority over soft, civilized people that I'll take great risks to prove it.
I'm easily manipulated by people I find attractive.
I'm not actually all that angry.
Gruul Anarch.entries.3.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Gruul Anarch.entries.4.entries.0: The members of the Gruul Clans rely on each other even as they vie for territory and glory. Their encounters with members of other guilds are more often violent than friendly, but occasional bonds do form.
Gruul Anarch.entries.4.entries.1: Roll twice on the Gruul Contacts table (for an ally and a rival) and once on the Non-Gruul Contacts table.
Gruul Anarch.entries.4.entries.2.caption: Gruul Contacts
One of my parents is a renowned warrior in my clan.
My sibling has the ear of the clan chief.
I have cousins in a different clan.
When we were younger, I was romantically involved with a prominent warrior in my clan.
A druid in my clan believes I have a destiny to fulfill.
The warrior who trained me remembers me for my exceptional potential.
My clan chief killed one of my parents, who had challenged the chief for leadership of the clan. Some combination of resentment and remorse stirs the clan chief to help me sometimes.
I made a strong impression on Borborygmos.
Gruul Anarch.entries.4.entries.3.caption: Non-Gruul Contacts
An Azorius arrester thinks I can be reformed.
A Boros soldier gives me gifts in exchange for information about other clans' movements.
I once caught and released a Dimir spy.
I consult with a Golgari shaman for spiritual guidance at times.
Roll an additional Gruul contact; you can decide if the contact is an ally or a rival.
An Izzet scientist blames the Gruul for the destruction of his life's work in a raid, but seems to think that I'm not like other Gruul.
I foolishly borrowed money from an Orzhov syndic to indulge a shameful vice.
A close friend left our clan and joined the Cult of Rakdos.
A distant relative is trying to recruit me into the Selesnya Conclave.
I stopped a Simic biomancer from trapping wild beasts to perform vile experiments on them.
Gruul Anarch.entries.4.name: Контакты
Gruul Anarch.entries.5.entries.0: In service of a simple goal, you have a simple part to play: Fight. Unleash your rage. Flatten buildings and defeat those who stand in your way. Be Gruul, in your own way.
Gruul Anarch.entries.5.entries.1: You will frequently be summoned to participate in a raid your clan is launching against the city or against a group of its defenders. Your clan leader might also send you on a special mission, though it would almost certainly still qualify as a raid. You might join a small group of Gruul warriors on a dangerous charge deep into the settled streets to plunder a certain location, retrieve an item stolen from your clan, or assault a Boros garrison.
Gruul Anarch.entries.5.entries.2: Sometimes your objective might be more esoteric. With prophecies of the return of Ilharg the Raze-Boar spreading like wildfire among the Gruul druids, you might be asked to carry out some task that the druids believe will speed his coming. Such a task might involve collecting a sacred relic held in an Orzhov vault or collecting sacrifices for a grand ceremony in the Raze-Boar's honor.
Gruul Anarch.entries.5.name: Какова моя роль?
Gruul Anarch.name: Gruul Anarch
Guard.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Guard.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Guard.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Guard.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Guard.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Spear|XPHB|Копьё}, {@item Light Crossbow|XPHB|Лёгкий арбалет}, 20 {@item Bolt|XPHB|Болтов}, {@item Gaming Set|XPHB|Игровой набор} (выбранный выше), {@item Hooded Lantern|XPHB|Закрытый фонарь}, {@item Manacles|XPHB|Кандалы}, {@item Quiver|XPHB|Колчан}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB|Дорожная одежда}, 12 ЗМ; или (Б) 50 ЗМ
Guard.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Guard.fluff.0: Когда вы только вспоминаете бесчисленные часы, проведённые на посту в башне, у вас начинают ныть ноги. Вы были обучены смотреть одним глазом за стены, высматривая мародеров из близлежащего леса, а другим глазом в поселение, следя за щипачами и смутьянами.
Guard.name: Стражник
Guide.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Guide.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Guide.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Guide.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Guide.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Shortbow|XPHB|Короткий лук}, {@item Arrow|XPHB|20 Стрел}, {@item Cartographer's Tools|XPHB|Инструменты картографа}, {@item Bedroll|XPHB|Спальник}, {@item Quiver|XPHB|Колчан}, {@item Tent|XPHB|Палатка}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB|Дорожная одежда}, 3 ЗМ; или (Б) 50 ЗМ
Guide.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Guide.fluff.0: Вы вошли в возраст под открытым небом, вдали от обжитых земель. Домом вам было то место, где вы решили расстелить свой спальник. В дикой природе есть чудеса — странные чудовища, девственные леса и ручьи, заросшие руины огромных залов, по которым когда-то ходили великаны — и исследуя их, вы научились постоять за себя. Временами вам доводилось быть проводником дружественным жрецам природы, которые обучали вас основам магии дикой природы.
Guide.name: Проводник
Guild Artisan.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Guild Artisan.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Guild Artisan.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Guild Artisan.entries.0.items.3.entry: {@filter инструменты ремесленника|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools} (на ваш выбор), рекомендательное письмо от вашей гильдии, {@item traveler's clothes|phb|дорожная одежда} и поясной {@item pouch|phb|кошель} с 15 зм
Guild Artisan.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Guild Artisan.entries.1.entries.0: Как признанный и уважаемый член гильдии, вы можете рассчитывать на определённые блага, которые даёт членство. Собратья по гильдии при необходимости предоставят вам кров и пищу, а если потребуется — оплатят ваши похороны. В некоторых городах и посёлках гильдейский зал служит местом встречи других мастеров вашего ремесла, где можно найти потенциальных покровителей, союзников или наёмников.
Guild Artisan.entries.1.entries.1: Гильдии часто обладают огромной политической властью. Если вас обвинят в преступлении, гильдия поддержит вас, если можно убедительно доказать вашу невиновность или оправданность преступления. Через гильдию вы также можете получить доступ к влиятельным политическим фигурам, если состоите в ней на хорошем счету. Такие связи могут потребовать пожертвования денег или магических предметов в казну гильдии.
Guild Artisan.entries.1.entries.2: Вы обязаны платить гильдии взносы в размере 5 зм в месяц. Если вы пропустите платежи, вам придётся погасить задолженность, чтобы остаться в милости у гильдии.
Guild Artisan.entries.1.name: Умение: Членство в гильдии
Guild Artisan.entries.2.entries.0: Гильдии обычно встречаются в городах, достаточно крупных, чтобы прокормить нескольких мастеров одного ремесла. Однако ваша гильдия может быть и свободной сетью ремесленников, каждый из которых трудится в своей деревне в пределах большого государства. Вместе с Мастером определите природу вашей гильдии. Вы можете выбрать ремесло гильдии из таблицы «Ремесло гильдии» или бросить наугад.
Guild Artisan.entries.2.entries.1.rows.1: Резчики по дереву, бондари и мастера луков
Guild Artisan.entries.2.name: Специальность
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.0: Гильдейские ремесленники — одни из самых обычных людей в мире, пока не отложат инструменты и не встанут на путь приключений. Они понимают цену упорному труду и важность общины, но подвержены грехам жадности и алчности.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.0: Я считаю, что любое стоящее дело надо делать как следует. Ничего не могу с собой поделать — я перфекционист.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.1: Я сноб и смотрю свысока на тех, кто не способен оценить высокое искусство.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.2: Мне всегда хочется знать, как всё устроено и что движет людьми.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.3: Я полон остроумных афоризмов, и у меня есть поговорка на любой случай.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.4: Я груб с теми, кому недостаёт моей преданности упорному труду и честной игре.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.5: Я люблю подолгу рассуждать о своём ремесле.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.6: Я нелегко расстаюсь с деньгами и неутомимо торгуюсь, чтобы заключить самую выгодную сделку.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.1.rows.7: Я знаменит своими работами и хочу, чтобы все их ценили. Меня всегда поражает, когда кто-то обо мне не слышал.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.2.rows.0: Община. Долг всех цивилизованных людей — укреплять узы общины и безопасность цивилизации. (Законопослушное)
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.2.rows.1: Щедрость. Мои таланты даны мне, чтобы я обращал их на благо мира. (Доброе)
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.2.rows.2: Свобода. Каждый должен быть волен сам зарабатывать себе на жизнь. (Хаотичное)
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.2.rows.4: Люди. Я предан тем, кто мне дорог, а не идеалам. (Нейтральное)
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.2.rows.5: Устремление. Я упорно тружусь, чтобы стать лучшим в своём ремесле. (Любое)
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.3.rows.0: Мастерская, где я обучился ремеслу, — самое важное место в мире для меня.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.3.rows.1: Я создал великую вещь для одного человека, а потом понял, что он недостоин её получить. Я всё ещё ищу того, кто достоин.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.3.rows.2: Я в большом долгу перед своей гильдией за то, что она сделала меня тем, кто я есть.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.3.rows.3: Я стремлюсь к богатству, чтобы завоевать чью-то любовь.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.3.rows.4: Однажды я вернусь в свою гильдию и докажу, что я величайший ремесленник из всех.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.3.rows.5: Я отомщу злым силам, что уничтожили моё дело и лишили меня средств к существованию.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.4.rows.0: Я пойду на что угодно, чтобы заполучить нечто редкое или бесценное.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.4.rows.1: Я быстро начинаю подозревать, что меня пытаются обмануть.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.4.rows.2: Никто никогда не должен узнать, что однажды я украл деньги из казны гильдии.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.4.rows.3: Мне всегда мало того, что у меня есть, — я вечно хочу большего.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.4.rows.4: Я готов убить, чтобы заполучить дворянский титул.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.entries.4.rows.5: Я страшно завидую всякому, кто способен затмить мою работу. Куда бы я ни пошёл, меня окружают соперники.
Guild Artisan.entries.3.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Guild Artisan.name: Guild Artisan
Harborfolk.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Harborfolk.entries.0.items.1.entry: One type of {@filter gaming set|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=gaming set}, {@filter vehicles (water)|items|source=phb;dmg|miscellaneous=mundane|type=vehicle (water)}
Harborfolk.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Harborfolk.entries.0.items.2.entry: {@item Fishing tackle|phb}, {@item dice set|phb}, {@item playing card set|phb}, or {@item Three-Dragon Ante set|phb}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, {@item rowboat}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 5 gp
Harborfolk.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Harborfolk.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Harborfolk.entries.2.entries.0: You are one of the hundreds of small-time fishermen and women who haul the bounty of Mulmaster's freshwater harbor to the city's markets each morning. You have spent countless days rowing in the waters in and around Mulmaster and know them and the other fisherfolk, dockworkers, and port inhabitants better than anyone. Though you have left that life behind, you still visit once in a while.
Harborfolk.entries.2.name: Обзор
Harborfolk.entries.3.entries.0: You grew up on the docks and waters of Mulmaster Harbor. The harborfolk remember you and still treat you as one of them. They welcome you and your companions. While they might charge you for it, they'll always offer what food and shelter they have; they'll even hide you if the City Watch is after you (but not if the Hawks are). Note: This feature is a variant of the Folk Hero feature.
Harborfolk.entries.3.name: Feature: Harborfolk
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.0.1: I am curious. I want to know why things are the way they are and why people do the things that they do.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.1.1: I can't sing, but that never stops me from doing it, loudly. Everyone loves a good sea chanty!
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.2.1: I think the High Blade is doing a terrific job, don't you?
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.3.1: I'm very excited that the House Built on Gold is being restored. I am a zealous worshipper of Waukeen.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.4.1: I am quite superstitious. I see portents in everyday occurrences.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.5.1: I resent the rich and enjoy thwarting their plans and spoiling their fun in small ways.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.6.1: I have a sea story to fit every occasion.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.0.rows.7.1: I'm a fisher, but I secretly detest eating fish. I will do anything to avoid it.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.1.rows.0.1: Calm. For all things, there is a tide. I set sail when it is right, and mend my nets when it is not. (Lawful)
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.1.rows.1.1: Windblown. I go where the winds blow. No man or woman tells me where or when to sail. (Chaotic)
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.1.rows.2.1: Aspiring. I will gain the favor of a Zor or Zora patron, maybe even one of the Blades! (Any)
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.1.rows.3.1: Salty. I want people to look to me as an expert on plying Mulmaster Harbor. (Any)
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.1.rows.4.1: Selfless. We are all children of the sea. I help everyone in peril afloat and ashore. (Good)
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.1.rows.5.1: Let them Drown. I refuse to risk my hide to help others. They wouldn't help me if roles were reversed. (Evil)
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.2.rows.0.1: I once lost everything but my rowboat. I'll do anything to protect it.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.2.rows.1.1: My brother was in the Soldiery, but he was killed. I really look up to the men and women who serve.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.2.rows.2.1: The Cloaks killed my friend for spellcasting. I'll get them back somehow, someday.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.2.rows.3.1: The High House of Hurting helped me when I was hurt and asked nothing in return. I owe them my life.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.2.rows.4.1: I was robbed in the Zhent ghetto once. It will not happen again.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.2.rows.5.1: I would do anything to protect the other harborfolk. They are my family.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.3.rows.0.1: I drink too much, which causes me to miss the tide.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.3.rows.1.1: I killed a drunk member of the City Watch in a brawl. I am terrified that they might find out.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.3.rows.2.1: I oversell myself and make promises I can't keep when I want to impress someone.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.3.rows.3.1: Book learning is a waste of time. I have no patience for people who don't speak from experience.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.3.rows.4.1: I almost always cheat. I can't help myself.
Harborfolk.entries.4.entries.3.rows.5.1: I am a secret informant for the Hawks. I send them reports about everything I see and hear, even what my friends and allies are up to.
Harborfolk.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Harborfolk.name: Harborfolk
Harper.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Harper.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Harper.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Harper.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
Harper.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Disguise Kit|XPHB}, {@item Bedroll|XPHB}, {@item Costume|XPHB}, {@item Grappling Hook|XPHB}, {@item Rope|XPHB}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 14 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Harper.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Harper.fluff.0: You accepted an invitation to join the Harpers, pledging an oath to uphold the Harper code and act in service to the common good. Like all Harpers, you understand the value of teamwork as well as when it's best to go it alone. Harper veterans have taught you the order's secrets—magical melodies, special watchwords, and legerdemain—and have entrusted you to use such knowledge to surveil and undermine the forces of evil.
Harper.name: Harper
Heretic.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Heretic.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Heretic.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Heretic.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Heretic.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Disguise Kit|XPHB}, Heretical Text, {@item Holy Symbol|XPHB}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Heretic.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Heretic.name: Heretic
Hermit.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Hermit.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Hermit.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Hermit.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментами:
Hermit.entries.0.items.4.entry: Выберите А или Б: (А) {@item Quarterstaff|XPHB|Боевой посох}, {@item Herbalism Kit|XPHB|Набор травника}, {@item Bedroll|XPHB|Спальник}, {@item Book|XPHB|Книга} (философия), {@item Lamp|XPHB|Лампа}, {@item Oil|XPHB|Масло} (3 фляги), {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB|Дорожная одежда}, 16 ЗМ; или (Б) 50 ЗМ
Hermit.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Hermit.fluff.0: Вы провели свои ранние годы в одиночестве, в хижине или монастыре, далеко за пределами ближайшего поселения. В те дни единственными вашими спутниками были лесные обитатели и те, кто время от времени навещал вас, принося новости о внешнем мире и припасы. В уединении вы провели много часов, размышляя о тайнах сотворения мира.
Hermit.name: Отшельник
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.0.items.2.entr: A set of {@item fine clothes|phb}, a {@item signet ring|phb}, a letter of introduction from your family's trading house, and a purse containing 25 gp
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.2.entries.0: Before becoming an adventurer, you were a successful merchant operating out Hillsfar, the City of Trade. Your family operated warehouses, organized caravans, managed stores, or owned a ship and has trade contacts throughout the Moonsea region, as well as up and down the length of the Sword Coast. Perhaps they import ore, uncut gems, untreated furs, or grain into the City of Trade, or they export fine cloth, faceted gems, fine furs, or Dragon's Breath, a brandy-like liquor. Regardless, you've largely given that life up for some reason and have chosen to seek adventure instead. Nevertheless, the training you received then, and perhaps the contacts you made, serve you well as an adventurer.
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.2.entries.1: Choose one of the following features:
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.2.name: Обзор
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.3.entries.0: Although you've left the day-to-day life of a merchant behind, your family has assigned you the services of a loyal retainer from the business, a factor, husbanding agent, seafarer, caravan guard, or clerk. This individual is a commoner who can perform mundane tasks for you such as making purchases, delivering messages, and running errands. He or she will not fight for you and will not follow you into obviously dangerous areas (such as dungeons), and will leave if frequently endangered or abused. If he or she is killed, the family assigns you another within a few days. Note: This feature is a variant of the Noble Knight's Retainers feature.
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.3.name: Feature: Factor
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.4.entries.0: You and your family have trade contacts such as caravan masters, shopkeepers, sailors, artisans, and farmers throughout the Moonsea region and all along the Sword Coast. Once per game session, when adventuring in either of those areas, you can use those contacts to get information about the local area or to pass a message to someone in those areas, even across the great distance between the two areas. Note: This feature is a variant of the Criminal Contact and Researcher features.
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.4.name: Alternate Feature: Trade Contact
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.5.entries.0.ro: I fill my evenings with wine or mead and song.
I greatly admire gladiators and enjoy the Arena.
I take my wealth for granted. It seldom occurs to me that others aren't rich themselves.
I leave broken hearts all around the Moonsea and up and down the Sword Coast.
I work hard and seldom make time for fun.
I am a particularly devout and pray often.
The Red Plumes caught me once. I hate them.
I ask a lot of questions to get information about those with whom I am working and dealing.
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.5.entries.1.ro: Frugal. I spend my money very carefully. (Lawful)
Profligate. I tend to spend extravagantly. (Chaotic)
Honest. I deal with others above board. (Any)
Sharp. I seek to make the best deal possible. (Any)
Charitable. I give generously to others. (Good)
Greedy. I do not share my wealth with others. (Evil)
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.5.entries.2.ro: I am fiercely loyal to those with whom I work.
I must uphold the good name of my family.
I will prove myself to my family as an adventurer.
Deals are sacrosanct. I never go back on my word.
I love making deals and negotiating agreements.
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.5.entries.3.ro: I am a braggart. I promote myself shamelessly.
I am vain. I always wear the latest fashions.
I am a glutton. I eat and drink to excess.
I am a snob. I want only the finest things in life.
I am lazy. I want others to take care of everything.
I am overconfident. I overestimate my abilities.
Hillsfar Merchant.entries.5.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Hillsfar Merchant.name: Hillsfar Merchant
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.0.items.1.name: Языки:
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение инструментом:
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.0.items.3.entr: A {@item forgery kit|phb}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, a belt {@item pouch|phb}, and 5 gp
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.2.entries.0: Hillsfar is the City of Trade. However, the Great Law of Trade only protects "legitimate" trade, trade that passes through the city's sole gate, which the Red Plumes monitor and tax. And the Great Law of Humanity banishes non-humans from the city altogether. The two Great Laws create great demand and great risk for smugglers, who shepherd illicit goods and non-humans into and out of the city by secret routes. The Rogues Guild tightly controls all of this activity, taking its cut from sanctioned jobs and exacting punishment for independent jobs.
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.2.entries.1: Perhaps you trafficked Dragon's Breath (a brandy-like liquor) to avoid tariffs or contraband to avoid seizure, or maybe you are a human who sympathizes with the non-humans and worked as part of the network of secret routes and safe houses that helps them pass through Hillsfar. Either way, you have contacts in the smuggling community who can help you slip into and out of the city unnoticed, for a price.
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.2.name: Обзор
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.3.entries.0: You can call on your contacts within the smuggling community to secure secret passage into or out of Hillsfar for yourself and your adventuring companions, no questions asked, and no Red Plume entanglements. Because you're calling in a favor, you can't be certain they will be able to help on your timetable or at all. Your Dungeon Master will determine whether you can be smuggled into or out of the city. In return for your passage, you and your companions may owe the Rouges Guild a favor and/or may have to pay bribes. Note: This feature is a variant of the Sailor feature.
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.3.name: Feature: Secret Passage
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.4.entries.0.ro: When I'm not smuggling, I gamble.
I just love Halfling cooking and baking!
I party with dwarves whenever I can.
I'm a terrible singer, but I love to do it.
I was raised to honor Chauntea and still do.
The blood sports of the Arena sicken me.
I think non-humans are really interesting.
I exaggerate the tales of my exploits.
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.4.entries.1.ro: Fair. I think everyone deserves to be treated fairly. I don't play favorites. (Lawful)
Impulsive. Planning is often a waste of time. No plan survives contact with reality. It's easier to dive in and deal with the consequences. (Chaotic)
Curious. I want to learn as much as I can about the people and places I encounter. (Any)
Prepared. I think success depends on preparing as much as possible in advance. (Any)
Respectful. I think everyone deserves to be treated with respect and dignity, regardless of their race, creed, color, or origin. (Good)
Corrupt. I will break the law or act dishonestly if the money is right. (Evil)
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.4.entries.2.ro: I am loyal to the Rogues Guild and would do anything for them.
I love the city of Hillsfar and my fellow Hillsfarians, despite the recent problems.
I admire the elves. I help them whenever I can.
A gnome helped me once. I pay the favor forward.
I enjoy tricking the Red Plumes at every opportunity.
I smuggled agricultural goods for non-human farmers. I try to help them when I can.
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.4.entries.3.ro: My hatred for the Red Plumes burns so brightly that I have difficulty suppressing It around them.
The Red Plumes caught me once before, and I was branded for my crime. If they catch me again, for any offense, the punishment will be dire.
I treat all Hillsfarians poorly. I am disgusted with their failure to revolt against the Great Law of Humanity.
I have difficulty trusting strangers. Anyone could be a spy for the authorities.
I am greedy. There Isn't much I won't do for money.
I'm an informant for the Red Plumes. They let me continue my activities, so long as I pass them information about illegal activity in Hillsfar.
Hillsfar Smuggler.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Hillsfar Smuggler.name: Hillsfar Smuggler
House Agent.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
House Agent.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
House Agent.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
House Agent.entries.0.items.3.entry: Выберите один вид {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB|Инструментов ремесленника}
House Agent.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
House Agent.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB} (same as above), {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 20 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Agent.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
House Agent.fluff.0: You are connected to one of the dragonmarked houses, but you haven't (yet) manifested a dragonmark. You might be a member of the family by birth or an employee of the house with no familial connection. You've earned your living by doing the business of the house, serving as the hands, feet, and eyes of house leadership in the world. You might have many old friends, mentors, and rivals in the house you serve, plus allies or enemies in other houses.
House Agent.name: House Agent
House Cannith Heir.entries.0.items.3.ent: Выберите один вид {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB|Инструментов ремесленника}
House Cannith Heir.entries.0.items.4.ent: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB} (same as above), {@item Crowbar|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 2 {@item Pouch|XPHB|Pouches}, 17 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Cannith Heir.fluff.0: As a scion of House Cannith, you carry a proud legacy. Cannith creates wonders of the modern world, and you're expected to contribute to the ongoing success of the house through invention, scholarship, business, or diplomacy. The only thing that can stand in your way is the deep rift within your own house. The sooner the three barons sort out which of them is the true head of the house (and you, no doubt, have your preference), the sooner House Cannith can claim its rightful position of leadership among all the dragonmarked houses.
House Cannith Heir.name: House Cannith Heir
House Deneith Heir.entries.0.items.4.ent: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Spear|XPHB}, {@item Shortbow|XPHB}, {@item Arrow|XPHB|20 Arrows}, {@item Gaming Set|XPHB} (same as above), {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Healer's Kit|XPHB}, {@item Quiver|XPHB}, 1 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Deneith Heir.fluff.0: As an heir of House Deneith, you've been trained for combat—not to seek it out, but not to shy from it either. You've learned the importance of duty, honor, and the laws used to govern society when duty and honor fail. As you established your name in the house, you might have worked as a bodyguard for some minor dignitary, as a mercenary, or as a marshal hunting fugitives. Now you're prepared to claim your rightful standing in the mightiest of the dragonmarked houses.
House Deneith Heir.name: House Deneith Heir
House Ghallanda Heir.entries.0.items.4.e: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Cook's Utensils|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Iron Pot|XPHB}, {@item Lamp|XPHB}, {@item Oil|XPHB} (5 flasks), {@item Perfume|XPHB}, 26 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Ghallanda Heir.fluff.0: Thanks to your connections to House Ghallanda, you grew up accustomed to creature comforts, lively conversation, good drink, and delicious food. You might be a charming and witty scion of the house who loves nothing more than a pleasant evening beside a warm hearth. Or you could be a schemer who exploits bonds of trust and friendship to bend others to your will. You might pursue an adventuring career to master the cuisines of other cultures and ages, expand your network of useful contacts, or earn enough money to open your own inn.
House Ghallanda Heir.name: House Ghallanda Heir
House Jorasco Heir.entries.0.items.4.ent: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Herbalism Kit|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Healer's Kit|XPHB}, 25 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Jorasco Heir.fluff.0: House Jorasco teaches that illness and injury stalk the living like ghosts, robbing people of health and longevity. You've been taught ways to combat these scourges, both magically and medically. You're trained to use those skills in the service of others—and to ascertain that you are always appropriately compensated for this service, ensuring the health and longevity of House Jorasco. You might be a kindly healer with no stomach for combat or a dispassionate specialist who knows exactly how to incapacitate or kill an enemy with precise strikes.
House Jorasco Heir.name: House Jorasco Heir
House Kundarak Heir.entries.0.items.4.en: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Thieves' Tools|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Kundarak Heir.fluff.0: As an heir of House Kundarak, you take great pride in your family and its work of safeguarding the valuables of Khorvaire. Your house has always been a leader among the clans of the Mror Holds. Though it has never held the crown, it has a reputation for professionalism, honor, and order. You might strive to uphold that reputation, you might place your own sense of honor over your family's, or you could rebel against the house's expectations and fl out the demands of honor.
House Kundarak Heir.name: House Kundarak Heir
House Lyrandar Heir.entries.0.items.4.en: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Navigator's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Lyrandar Heir.fluff.0: As an heir of House Lyrandar, the wind is your ally, the sea and sky your dominion. Despite the devastation of the Last War, your house is on the ascendancy, buoyed by its mastery of the new airship technology. You might have spent your early career on the sea as a sailor or navigator; as a shipwright; or as a member of the Raincallers' Guild, manipulating the weather and assisting with irrigation and similar public works. Or you might have been among the fi rst in your house to take to the skies as part of an airship crew. Service to the house might call you to hunt pirates in the Lhazaar Sea, to explore ancient ruins in search of magical technology to bind elemental forces, or to salvage a wrecked airship in the Mournland.
House Lyrandar Heir.name: House Lyrandar Heir
House Medani Heir.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
House Medani Heir.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
House Medani Heir.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
House Medani Heir.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
House Medani Heir.entries.0.items.4.entr: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Disguise Kit|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Medani Heir.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
House Medani Heir.fluff.0: As a member of House Medani, your life revolves around subterfuge—not engaging in it, but preventing others from doing so. You see the world around you as an intricate web of schemes, plots, and counterplots. Assessing the range of possibilities, you use instinct to predict threats to your clients and defend against them well before those threats can turn into danger. Defending against an assassin's blade is a job any Deneith sellsword or Tharashk enforcer can do—making sure no one ever draws that blade is the Medani way.
House Medani Heir.name: House Medani Heir
House Orien Heir.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
House Orien Heir.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
House Orien Heir.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
House Orien Heir.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
House Orien Heir.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Cartographer's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Map|XPHB}, {@item Map or Scroll Case|XPHB}, 18 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Orien Heir.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
House Orien Heir.fluff.0: Before the Last War, Orien's influence covered Khorvaire, and its trade roads and lightning rails were the lifeblood of a vibrant kingdom. But the war cut those arteries, leaving Galifar dead and House Orien bloodied. While the house's couriers and shippers still keep goods moving on both sides of the continent, finding a way to reestablish routes across the Mournland remains the house's top priority. In the meantime, Orien adventurers can serve their house by investigating missing couriers, recovering goods stolen from caravans, and troubleshooting disruptions to the lightning rail.
House Orien Heir.name: House Orien Heir
House Phiarlan Heir.entries.0.items.4.en: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Disguise Kit|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Phiarlan Heir.fluff.0: Though you have seen wealth, fame, and beauty as a child of House Phiarlan, you consider knowledge (and the power it brings) the greatest treasure of all. You might pursue that power as an artist or performer, always alert for secrets even as you regale the world with story, song, acrobatics, or art. Or you might foster ties to the secretive espionage arm of your house: the Serpentine Table.
House Phiarlan Heir.name: House Phiarlan Heir
House Sivis Heir.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
House Sivis Heir.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
House Sivis Heir.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
House Sivis Heir.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
House Sivis Heir.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Calligrapher's Supplies|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Ink|XPHB}, 5 {@item Ink Pen|XPHB|Ink Pens}, {@item Paper|XPHB} (30 sheets), {@item Parchment|XPHB} (9 sheets), 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Sivis Heir.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
House Sivis Heir.fluff.0: For nearly thirty centuries, your family has worked to maintain order. Communication is the cord that binds civilization together, and your ancestors settled the disputes of sovereigns and helped the dragonmarked houses find a place in the world. Few people realize the influence House Sivis has had on the shape of the modern age—just as few know how often a royal adviser holds more power than the actual ruler. While the other dragonmarked houses fight for fame and recognition, House Sivis plays a long game of subtle influence behind the scenes, keeping order amid the chaos of unending intrigue.
House Sivis Heir.name: House Sivis Heir
House Tharashk Heir.entries.0.items.4.en: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Gaming Set|XPHB} (same as above), {@item Climber's Kit|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Hunting Trap|XPHB}, {@item Manacles|XPHB}, 2 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Tharashk Heir.fluff.0: Heirs of other houses lead lives of luxury, but in House Tharashk you learned self-reliance from an early age. What your young house lacks in resources, it makes up for in spirit and determination. Tharashk has a destiny to fulfill, and you have a part in it. Whether in combat or in social interaction, you have learned to play the role of the hunter: study your enemies, exploit their weaknesses, and do whatever it takes to achieve victory.
House Tharashk Heir.name: House Tharashk Heir
House Thuranni Heir.entries.0.items.3.en: Выберите один вид {@item Musical Instrument|XPHB|музыкального инструмента}
House Thuranni Heir.entries.0.items.4.en: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Musical Instrument|XPHB} (same as above), {@item Costume|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, 13 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Thuranni Heir.fluff.0: Given House Thuranni's short history and focus on espionage, its leaders expect you to further the interests of the house at every opportunity. During the house's formative years as an independent entity, every move you make has been watched closely. This isn't to say that every Thuranni heir must actively spy at the behest of house elders. But even the house's most insular artists and artisans must keep up with current political events and pass on or collect information when asked.
House Thuranni Heir.name: House Thuranni Heir
House Vadalis Heir.entries.0.items.4.ent: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Herbalism Kit|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Net|PHB}, 29 GP; or (B) 50 GP
House Vadalis Heir.fluff.0: You have grown up with respect for both family and nature. You understand the culture of the Five Nations, but you don't get drawn into the games of ambition and status that others play. You know the beauty and power inherent in life, the mysteries of birth and death, and the miracles that happen in between. Your insights into the natural world allow you to see through the lies and deception of city folk—and never let on how much of their subterfuge you recognize.
House Vadalis Heir.name: House Vadalis Heir
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.2.entry: {@skill Animal Handling|XPHB|Уход за животными} и {@skill Athletics|XPHB|Атлетика}
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Woodcarver's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Basket|XPHB}, {@item Block and Tackle|XPHB}, {@item Chain|XPHB}, {@item Hunting Trap|XPHB}, {@item Net|XPHB}, {@item Pole|XPHB}, {@item Rations|XPHB} (3 days' worth), {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 32 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Ice Fisher.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Ice Fisher.fluff.0: You come from a proud line of ice fishers out of Ten-Towns in Icewind Dale. Catching knucklehead trout isn't the most glorious trade in the North, but it's an honest living. You've trained your senses for the slightest tug on the line, wrestled big trout out of ice-covered lakes, and gutted enough knucklehead trout to feed your village many times over. These experiences have toughened your body and mind for a life of adventuring.
Ice Fisher.name: Ice Fisher
Inheritor.entries.0.items.0.entry: {@skill Survival}, plus one from among {@skill Arcana}, {@skill History}, and {@skill Religion}
Inheritor.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Inheritor.entries.0.items.1.name: Языки:
Inheritor.entries.0.items.2.entry: Your choice of a {@filter gaming set|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=gaming set} or a {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument}
Inheritor.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение инструментом:
Inheritor.entries.0.items.3.entry: Your inheritance, a set of {@item traveler's clothes|phb}, the tool you choose for this background's tool proficiency ({@filter gaming set|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=gaming set} or {@filter musical instrument|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=instrument}), and a {@item pouch|phb} containing 15 gp
Inheritor.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.0: Choose or randomly determine your inheritance from the possibilities in the table below. Work with your Dungeon Master to come up with details: Why is your inheritance so important, and what is its full story? You might prefer for the DM to invent these details as part of the game, allowing you to learn more about your inheritance as your character does.
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.1: The Dungeon Master is free to use your inheritance as a story hook, sending you on quests to learn more about its history or true nature, or confronting you with foes who want to claim it for themselves or prevent you from learning what you seek. The DM also determines the properties of your inheritance and how they figure into the item's history and importance. For instance, the object might be a minor magic item, or one that begins with a modest ability and increases in potency with the passage of time. Or, the true nature of your inheritance might not be apparent at first and is revealed only when certain conditions are met.
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.2: When you begin your adventuring career, you can decide whether to tell your companions about your inheritance right away. Rather than attracting attention to yourself, you might want to keep your inheritance a secret until you learn more about what it means to you and what it can do for you.
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.3.rows.0.1: A document such as a map, a letter, or a journal
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.3.rows.1.1: a trinket (see "Trinkets" in chapter 5 of the Player's Handbook)
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.3.rows.5.1: a written story, song, poem, or secret
Inheritor.entries.1.entries.3.rows.6.1: a tattoo or other body marking
Inheritor.entries.1.name: Feature: Inheritance
Inheritor.entries.2.entries.0: Use the tables for the {@background folk hero} background in the Player's Handbook as the basis for your traits and motivations, modifying the entries when appropriate to suit your identity as an inheritor.
Inheritor.entries.2.entries.1: Your bond might be directly related to your inheritance, or to the person from whom you received it. Your ideal might be influenced by what you know about your inheritance, or by what you intend to do with your gift once you realize what it is capable of.
Inheritor.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Inheritor.name: Наследник
Initiate (Dissenter).name: Initiate (Dissenter)
Initiate.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Initiate.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Initiate.entries.0.items.2.entry: A simple puzzle box, a scroll containing the basic teachings of the five gods, a {@filter gaming set|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=gaming set}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 15 gp. If you have completed any trials before the start of the campaign, you also have any cartouches you have earned
Initiate.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Initiate.entries.1.entries.0: Your life is oriented around your participation in the five trials that will determine your worthiness in the afterlife. While you prepare for and undergo those trials, you have constant access to training. A comfortable place to live and regular meals are provided to you by servitor mummies (the anointed) under the supervision of viziers. You can enjoy these benefits only as long as you obey the societal norms of Naktamun—training for the trials (with or without your crop), obeying the orders of the gods, and following the instructions of their viziers. If you violate these norms, you risk being treated as a dissenter. See "{@book Trials of the Five Gods|PS-A|3}" for more information about undertaking the trials and their rewards.
Initiate.entries.1.name: Feature: Trials of the Five Gods
Initiate.entries.2.entries.0: An initiate's life is focused on the trials, but it doesn't need to be all about the trials. Though some initiates are highly focused on their training, most undergo that training while also experiencing joy, sorrow, love, loss, anger, jealousy, hope, faith, delight—the whole range of mortal emotions and experience. The afterlife might be a constant presence in every initiate's mind, but it is the culmination of a life well-lived—not a replacement for it.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.0.1: I always have a joke on hand when the mood gets too serious.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.1.1: I use sarcasm and insults to keep a distance between myself and my crop-mates, because I don't want to get attached to them.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.2.1: I'll settle for nothing less than perfection—in myself, in my cropmates, in everything.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.3.1: I'm so focused on the glorious afterlife that nothing in this life can shake my calm resolve.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.4.1: I enjoy using my skills to help those who lack those same skills.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.5.1: I train hard so that I can play hard at the end of the day. I fully expect to play even harder in the glorious afterlife, but I'm not in a hurry to get there.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.6.1: I'm perfectly happy letting others pick up the slack for me while I take it easy.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.1.rows.7.1: I'm constantly sizing up everyone around me, thinking about what kind of opponent they'll be in the final trial.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.rows.0.1: {@b Solidarity.} The thing that matters most of all is that we're there for each other. (Lawful)
Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.rows.1.1: {@b Knowledge.} The world is a puzzle—a mystery waiting to be solved. (Neutral)
Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.rows.2.1: {@b Strength.} All that matters to me is my own perfection. Let everyone else seek that perfection in their own way. (Any)
Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.rows.3.1: {@b Ambition.} I'm going to prove that I deserve only the best—of everything. (Evil)
Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.rows.4.1: {@b Zeal.} Anything worth doing is worth throwing my whole self into. (Any)
Initiate.entries.2.entries.2.rows.5.1: {@b Redemption.} I will train all the harder to make up for the doubt I entertained when I was younger. (Any)
Initiate.entries.2.entries.3.rows.0.1: One of my crop-mates is my dearest friend, and I hope we will face each other in the final trial.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.3.rows.1.1: I am in love with a vizier.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.3.rows.2.1: I am particularly drawn to one of the five gods, and I want nothing more than to win that god's particular favor.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.3.rows.3.1: I am more devoted to Naktamun and its people than I am to any of the ideals of the gods.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.3.rows.4.1: My weapon was a gift from a beloved trainer who died in an accident.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.3.rows.5.1: I carry a memento of my time as an acolyte, and I treasure it above all other things.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.4.rows.0.1: I'm easily distracted by an attractive person, which could be the death of me in the trials.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.4.rows.1.1: I really wanted to be a vizier, and I'm angry at the god who didn't choose me.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.4.rows.2.1: Training for a lifetime to die in the end seems like a big waste of energy.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.4.rows.3.1: I'm not at all sure I'll be able to grant a glorified death to any of my crop-mates.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.4.rows.4.1: I have a lasting grudge against one of my crop-mates, and each of us wants to see the other fail.
Initiate.entries.2.entries.4.rows.5.1: I think I've figured out that this world is not what it seems. Something dark is going on here.
Initiate.entries.2.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Initiate.name: Initiate
Inquisitive.entries.0.items.0.name: Очки характеристик:
Inquisitive.entries.0.items.1.name: Черта:
Inquisitive.entries.0.items.2.name: Владение навыками:
Inquisitive.entries.0.items.3.name: Владение инструментом:
Inquisitive.entries.0.items.4.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Thieves' Tools|XPHB}, {@item Bullseye Lantern|XPHB}, {@item Crowbar|XPHB}, {@item Oil|XPHB} (10 flasks), {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Inquisitive.entries.0.items.4.name: Экипировка:
Inquisitive.fluff.0: You have honed your talents of investigation and deduction—fueled by a boundless curiosity—to explore mysteries, find missing people, recover stolen goods, unearth corruption and conspiracies, and solve crimes. As an inquisitive, you might have pursued freelance work, signed on with an inquisitive agency (perhaps one licensed by a dragonmarked house such as Medani or Tharashk), reported for a broadsheet, or worked for a police force.
Inquisitive.name: Сыщик
Inquisitor of the Faithful.entries.0.ite: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Club|XPHB}, {@item Navigator's Tools|XPHB}, Book Containing Holy Rites, {@item Holy Symbol|XPHB}, Interrogator's Tools, {@item Manacles|XPHB}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 10 GP; or (B) 50 GP
Inquisitor of the Faithful.name: Inquisitor of the Faithful
Inquisitor.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Inquisitor.entries.0.items.1.entry: {@item Thieves' tools|phb}, one type of {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools}
Inquisitor.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Inquisitor.entries.0.items.2.entry: A {@item holy symbol|phb}, a set of {@item traveler's clothes|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 15 gp
Inquisitor.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Inquisitor.entries.1.entries.0: As an inquisitor of the church, you have the authority to arrest criminals. In the absence of other authorities, you are authorized to pass judgement and even carry out sentencing. If you abuse this power, however, your superiors in the church might strip it from you.
Inquisitor.entries.1.name: Умение: Законная власть
Inquisitor.name: Inquisitor
Investigator.entries.0.items.0.entry: Choose two from among {@skill Insight}, {@skill Investigation}, or {@skill Perception}
Investigator.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Investigator.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Investigator.entries.0.items.2.entry: A {@item magnifying glass|PHB}, evidence from a past case (choose one or roll for a trinket from the {@item Horror Trinket|VRGR|Horror Trinkets} later in this chapter), a {@item Common Clothes|PHB|set of common clothes}, and 10 gp
Investigator.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Investigator.entries.1.entries.0: You're experienced at gaining access to people and places to get the information you need. Through a combination of fast-talking, determination, and official-looking documentation, you can gain access to a place or an individual related to a crime you're investigating. Those who aren't involved in your investigation avoid impeding you or pass along your requests. Additionally, local law enforcement has firm opinions about you, viewing you as either a nuisance or one of their own.
Investigator.entries.1.name: Feature: Official Inquiry
Investigator.entries.2.entries.0: Your first case influenced the types of mysteries you're interested in. Why was this case so impactful, personal, or traumatic? Whom did it affect besides you? Why and how did you get involved? Was it solved? How did it set you on the path to investigating other mysteries? Roll on or choose details from the First Case table to develop the mystery that started your career as an investigator.
Investigator.entries.2.entries.1.caption: First Case
A friend was wrongfully accused of murder. You tracked down the actual killer, proving your friend's innocence and starting your career as a detective.
You're told you went missing for weeks. When you were found, you had no memory of being gone. Now you search to discover what happened to you.
You helped a spirit find peace by finding its missing corpse. Ever since, other spectral clients have sought you out to help them find rest.
You revealed that the monsters terrorizing your home were illusions created by a cruel mage. The magic-user escaped, but you've continued to uncover magical hoaxes.
You were wrongfully accused and convicted of a crime. You managed to escape and seek to help others avoid the experience you suffered, even while still being pursued by the law.
You survived the destructive use of a magic device that wiped out your home. Members of a secret organization found you. You now work with them, tracking down dangerous supernatural phenomena and preventing them from doing harm.
You found evidence of a conspiracy underpinning society. You tried to expose this mysterious cabal, but no one believed you. You're still trying to prove what you know is true.
You got a job with an agency that investigates crimes that local law enforcement can't solve. You often wonder which you value more, the truth or your pay.
Investigator.entries.2.name: Path to Mystery
Investigator.entries.3.entries.0: Characters in a horror-focused campaign might have distinct motivations and characteristics. Use the following tables to supplement your background's suggested characteristics or to inspire those of your own design.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.1.caption: Horror Character Personality Traits
I had an encounter that I believe gives me a special affinity with a supernatural creature or event.
A signature piece of clothing or distinct weapon serves as an emblem of who I am.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.1.rows.10: I'm quick to jump to extreme solutions. Why risk a lesser option not working?
Investigator.entries.3.entries.1.rows.11: I'm easily startled, but I'm not a coward.
I never accept that I'm out of my depth.
I must know the answer to every secret. No door remains unopened in my presence.
I let people underestimate me, revealing my full competency only to those close to me.
I compulsively seek to collect trophies of my travels and victories.
It doesn't matter if the whole world's against me. I'll always do what I think is right.
I have morbid interests and a macabre aesthetic.
I have a personal ritual, mantra, or relaxation method I use to deal with stress.
Nothing is more important than life, and I never leave anyone in danger.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.2.caption: Horror Character Ideals
Adrenaline. I've experienced such strangeness that now I feel alive only in extreme situations.
Balance. I strive to counter the deeds of someone for whom I feel responsible.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.2.rows.10: Sanctuary. I know the forces at work in the world and strive to create islands apart from them.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.2.rows.11: Truth. I care about the truth above all else, even if it doesn't benefit anyone.
Bound. I've wronged someone and must work their will to avoid their curse.
Escape. I believe there is something beyond the world I know, and I need to find it.
Legacy. I must do something great so that I'm remembered, and my time is running out.
Misdirection. I work vigorously to keep others from realizing my flaws or misdeeds.
Obsession. I've lived this way for so long that I can't imagine another way.
Obligation. I owe it to my people, faith, family, or teacher to continue a vaunted legacy.
Promise. My life is no longer my own. I must fulfill the dream of someone who's gone.
Revelation. I need to know what lies beyond the mysteries of death, the world, or the Mists.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.3.caption: Horror Character Bonds
I desperately need to get back to someone or someplace, but I lost them in the Mists.
Everything I do is in the service of a powerful master, one I must keep a secret from everyone.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.3.rows.10: I use my cunning mind to solve mysteries and find justice for those who've been wronged.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.3.rows.11: I lost someone I care about, but I still see them in guilty visions, recurring dreams, or as a spirit.
I owe much to my vanished mentor. I seek to continue their work even as I search to find them.
I've seen great darkness, and I'm committed to being a light against it—the light of all lights.
Someone I love has become a monster, murderer, or other threat. It's up to me to redeem them.
The world has been convinced of a terrible lie. It's up to me to reveal the truth.
I deeply miss someone and am quick to adopt people who remind me of them.
A great evil dwells within me. I will fight against it and the world's other evils for as long as I can.
I'm desperately seeking a cure to an affliction or a curse, either for someone close to me for myself.
Spirits are drawn to me. I do all I can to help them find peace.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.4.caption: Horror Character Flaws
I believe doom follows me and that anyone who gets close to me will face a tragic end.
I'm convinced something is after me, appearing in mirrors, dreams, and places where no one could.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.4.rows.10: I have a reputation for defeating a great evil, but that's a lie and the wicked force knows.
Investigator.entries.3.entries.4.rows.11: I know the ends always justify the means and am quick to make sacrifices to attain my goals.
I'm especially superstitious and live life seeking to avoid bad luck, wicked spirits, or the Mists.
I've done unspeakable evil and will do anything to prevent others from finding out.
I am exceptionally credulous and believe any story or legend immediately.
I'm a skeptic and don't believe in the power of rituals, religion, superstition, or spirits.
I know my future is written and that anything I do will lead to a prophesied end.
I need to find the best in everyone and everything, even when that means denying obvious malice.
I've seen the evil of a type of place—like forests, cities, or graveyards—and resist going there.
I'm exceptionally cautious, planning laboriously and devising countless contingencies.
Investigator.entries.3.name: Horror Characteristics
Investigator.name: Investigator
Iron Route Bandit.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Iron Route Bandit.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Iron Route Bandit.entries.0.items.2.entr: A set of dark {@item common clothes|phb}, {@item pack saddle|phb}, {@item burglar's pack|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 5 gp
Iron Route Bandit.entries.0.items.2.name: Экипировка:
Iron Route Bandit.entries.1.name: Образ жизни
Iron Route Bandit.entries.2.entries.0: The Iron Route, once the primary trade route between Phlan and Zhentil Keep, used to be a site of extensive banditry until the Phlan's recent occupation. Your time as an erstwhile bandit has given you plenty of experience in the saddle and a knack for acquiring and appraising other people's mounts, pets, and vehicles among other things. This particular set of skills has become very lucrative for you by working for the underground as a horse thief for a local guild of thieves and other shadowy organizations.
Iron Route Bandit.entries.2.name: Обзор
Iron Route Bandit.entries.3.entries.0: You know how to find people who are always looking for stolen animals & vehicles, whether to provide for animal pit fights, or to supply some desperate rogues the means to get away faster on mounts during an illegal job. This contact not only provides you with information of what such animals & vehicles are in high demand in the area, but also offer to give you favors and information (DM choice) if you bring such animals & vehicles to them. Note: This is a variant of the Criminal Contact feature.
Iron Route Bandit.entries.3.name: Feature: Black-Market Breeder
Iron Route Bandit.entries.4.entries.0.ro: If people leave their gear unsecured, they must not want it very much.
I feel more comfortable sleeping under the open sky.
I always pre-plan my escape should things go bad; I always like to have an exit strategy.
I tend to give animal owners breeding and care advice whether or not they want it.
I lost a pet as a child and sadly reflect on it to this day.
I always form a powerful, emotional bond with my mount.
I recoil at the thought of killing someone else's pet or mount.
I prefer to hang to the back of a scuffle or discussion. Better to have my enemies in front of me.
Iron Route Bandit.entries.4.entries.1.ro: Loyalty. Never bite the hand that feeds. (Good)
Unpredictability. Keep your enemy guessing and off-balance like a confused deer. (Chaotic)
Power. I strive to become leader of the pack at all costs. (Lawful)
Freedom. I bow to no one I don't respect. (Chaotic)
Resourcefulness. Our wits are our most valuable resource in troubled times. (Any)
Unity. Lone wolves fail where the pack succeeds. (Any)
Iron Route Bandit.entries.4.entries.2.ro: I cannot leave a harmed animal behind; I must save it or put it out of its misery.
I leave behind my own personal calling cards when I do a job.
I do not trust people who do not have a pet, mount, or furry companion.
The pelt I wear on my back was from an animal that died saving my life, I will always cherish it.
If my pet does not like you, I do not like you!
Once you've ridden with me and fought by my side, I'll be there for you odds be damned.
Iron Route Bandit.entries.4.entries.3.ro: I talk to animals; I believe they understand me, even if they do not.
I growl at and bite anyone who gets too close to my food while I am eating.
I strongly dislike enclosed spaces and require intoxication or firm encouragement to enter them.
I robbed the wrong caravan once. The owner is a powerful merchant who holds a grudge.
I judge people based on how well they stand their ground in a fight. I got not time for cowards...
Iron Route Bandit.entries.4.name: Рекомендуемые черты характера
Iron Route Bandit.name: Iron Route Bandit
Izzet Engineer.entries.0.items.0.name: Владение навыками:
Izzet Engineer.entries.0.items.1.name: Владение инструментом:
Izzet Engineer.entries.0.items.2.entry: Choose one of Draconic, Goblin, or Vedalken
Izzet Engineer.entries.0.items.2.name: Языки:
Izzet Engineer.entries.0.items.3.entry: An Izzet insignia, one set of {@filter artisan's tools|items|source=phb|miscellaneous=mundane|type=artisan's tools}, the charred and twisted remains of a failed experiment, a {@item hammer|phb}, a {@item block and tackle|phb}, a set of {@item common clothes|phb}, and a belt {@item pouch|phb} containing 5 gp (Azorius 1-zino coins)
Izzet Engineer.entries.0.items.3.name: Экипировка:
Izzet Engineer.entries.1.entries.0: The popular conception of the Izzet League is based on mad inventions, dangerous experiments, and explosive blasts. Much of that perception is accurate, but the league is also involved with mundane tasks of construction and architecture—primarily in crafting the infrastructure that allows Ravnicans to enjoy running water, levitating platforms, and other magical and technological wonders.
Izzet Engineer.entries.1.entries.1: You have a basic knowledge of the structure of buildings, including the stuff behind the walls. You can also find blueprints of a specific building in order to learn the details of its construction. Such blueprints might provide knowledge of entry points, structural weaknesses, or secret spaces. Your access to such information isn't unlimited. If obtaining or using the information gets you in trouble with the law, the guild can't shield you from the repercussions.
Izzet Engineer.entries.1.name: Feature: Urban Infrastructure
Izzet Engineer.entries.2.entries.0: {@i Требование: Использование заклинаний или Магия договора}
Izzet Engineer.entries.2.entries.1: For you, the spells on the Izzet Guild Spells table are added to the spell list of your spellcasting class. (If you are a multiclass character with multiple spell lists, these spells are added to all of them.)
{@spell chaos bolt|XGE}, {@spell create or destroy water}, {@spell unseen servant}
{@spell call lightning}, {@spell elemental weapon}, {@spell glyph of warding}
{@spell conjure minor elementals}, {@spell divination}, {@spell Otiluke's resilient sphere}
Izzet Engineer.entries.2.entries.3: Your spells tend to be loud, flashy, or explosive, even when the effect is unremarkable. For example, when you open the portal of a {@spell rope trick} spell, the portal might be outlined by harmless, showy sparkles.
Izzet Engineer.entries.2.entries.4: If you use an arcane focus, it probably takes the form of an intricate device that could include metal gauntlets, glass canisters, copper tubing, and leather straps attaching it to your body.
